description: The Clan Di Lauro is a Camorra organization based in the northern neighborhoods of Naples, Italy, founded by Paolo Di Lauro in 1982. At its peak in the 1990s and early 2000s, it earned over €500,000 daily from drug sales, making Secondigliano the largest open-air drug market in Europe. The clan was involved in a violent internal feud in 2004, leading to the Scissionisti di Secondigliano split. Its power declined after the arrest of Paolo Di Lauro in 2005.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 1º aprile 2004 viene arrestato in Francia Vincenzo Di Lauro.
country_links.context: The clan had a member arrested in France, indicating presence or activity there.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico internazionale di stupefacenti (in particolare cocaina proveniente dalla Spagna )
country_links.context: The clan sourced cocaine from Spain.
